_note: Documentation only. No page or script loads this file; the Plausible tag is hardcoded in each page's <head>. Keep it in sync with public/privacy/index.html by hand.

privacyFeatures.dataRetention: indefinite (Plausible Community Edition has no automatic expiry; no retention job is configured)

notes.selfHosting: Already self-hosted: Plausible Community Edition runs on our own VPS and serves both the script above and the dashboard at https://analytics.pdoom1.com
